# LIKKI UNLOCKING

> Wholesale IMEI checks, carrier lookup, iCloud, blacklist & device unlocking with instant results and a developer-first API. Trusted by 10,000+ resellers since 2018.

LIKKI UNLOCKING is a direct wholesale supplier for the mobile repair industry. Resellers, repair shops and developers use the platform to verify any IMEI (iCloud / FMI status, carrier, blacklist, model, warranty) and submit phone unlock orders. Pricing is wallet-based — no subscriptions, pay per check. A simple HTTP API is available for integration.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, services, pricing and trust signals.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of IMEI check and unlock services with pricing and delivery times.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Wholesale pricing tiers and wallet top-up information.
- [Free Check](/free-check): Free IMEI checks for first-time visitors.
- [API Docs](/api-docs): REST API reference for integrating IMEI checks into your platform.
- [Register](/register): Create a wholesale account.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your account.

## Optional

- [Forgot password](/forgot-password)
